title: Query Parameters
content:
### Basic Query Parameters

Function parameters that are not part of the path become query parameters:

```python
from fastapi import FastAPI

app = FastAPI()

@app.get("/items/")
async def read_items(skip: int = 0, limit: int = 10):
    return {"skip": skip, "limit": limit}
```

URL: `/items/?skip=0&limit=10`

### Optional vs Required

Default values make query parameters optional. Without defaults, they are required:

```python
@app.get("/search/")
async def search(
    q: str,                    # Required query parameter
    category: str = "all",     # Optional with default
    page: int = 1,             # Optional with default
    sort: str | None = None    # Optional, can be None
):
    return {
        "query": q,
        "category": category,
        "page": page,
        "sort": sort
    }
```

URL: `/search/?q=python&category=books&page=2`

### Type Validation with `Query`

Use the `Query` class for additional validation:

```python
from fastapi import Query

@app.get("/items/")
async def read_items(
    q: str | None = Query(None, min_length=3, max_length=50, regex="^[a-zA-Z]+"),
    page: int = Query(1, ge=1, le=100),
    size: int = Query(10, ge=1, le=100)
):
    return {"q": q, "page": page, "size": size}
```

### Boolean Conversion

FastAPI auto-converts common boolean string representations:

```python
@app.get("/items/")
async def read_items(available: bool = False):
    return {"available": available}
```

`/items/?available=true` -> `True`
`/items/?available=1` -> `True`
`/items/?available=yes` -> `True`
`/items/?available=false` -> `False`
`/items/?available=0` -> `False`

### Multiple Values

Receive multiple values for the same parameter:

```python
@app.get("/items/")
async def read_items(q: list[str] = Query([])):
    return {"q": q}
```

URL: `/items/?q=apple&q=banana&q=cherry`
Response: `{"q": ["apple", "banana", "cherry"]}`

### Query Parameter Metadata

Add documentation to query parameters:

```python
@app.get("/items/")
async def read_items(
    q: str | None = Query(
        None,
        title="Search query",
        description="Search items by name or description",
        min_length=3,
        deprecated=False
    )
):
    return {"q": q}
```

quiz.question: How do you make a query parameter optional in FastAPI?
Which class provides additional validation for query parameters?
